query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN mediaAvaliacoesRespondidas IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_nota, COUNT(CASE WHEN progressoTotal > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_progresso, COUNT(CASE WHEN aulasConcluidas > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_aulas FROM student_performance;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN mediaAvaliacoesRespondidas IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_nota, COUNT(CASE WHEN progressoTotal > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_progresso, COUNT(CASE WHEN aulasConcluidas > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_aulas FROM student_performance;
